Off Calendar Sep-20-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance(s) on FRI-SEP-20-2013:
Arlen Litman-Cleper, Esq. of Harrington, Foxx, Dubrow & Canter, LLP [415.288.6600] appearing for defendants CORY BIRNBERG and BIRNBERG & ASSOCIATES;
No other appearances.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling. [Defendants' had two motions set this day. The tentative rulings were inadvertently published in reverse/transposed order.] Defendants CORY BIRNBERG'S and BIRNBERG & ASSOCIATES' Motion to Compel Plaintiff's Responses to Form Interrogatories, Set One is Granted in part, no opposition. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Charles O. Geerhart; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)
